hero.headline: What did they <gold>promise</gold>?
hero.subheadline: Choose a country and a topic. We show you exactly what each candidate promised — from their own official pages. No opinions. No bias. Just the facts.
hero.searchLabel: Choose what you want to compare

howItWorks.step2Desc: Health, economy, education — or see everything

promise.ourPromiseText: We never accept money from politicians. We never editorialize. We only compare.

compare.title: What did each candidate promise?
compare.noPromise: No promise found for this topic in official sources.

audit.title: Audit portal
audit.subtitle: Every promise in our database is publicly verifiable. Verify any record independently — without trusting us.
audit.w1: Has NOT received any government order to remove or modify data
audit.w2: Has NOT received legal threats from any candidate or political actor
audit.w3: Has NOT been contacted by any intelligence agency
audit.w4: Has NOT been pressured to favor or disfavor any candidate
audit.w5: Has NOT modified any collected promise data under political pressure
audit.howToVerify: How to verify any promise record

manifesto.title: Our manifesto
manifesto.subtitle: "The truth emerges from contrast — not from repetition."
manifesto.whyP1: We live in an era of excess. Words, promises, speeches and data float in an ocean of digital noise. In any corner of the world, the human desire for a better future remains constant.
manifesto.whyP2: World Contrast was born from a simple premise: information is not enough. Clarity is. We do not tell you who to believe. We do not point the way. We only illuminate the differences — and let you decide.
manifesto.whatTitle: What we do — and what we never do
manifesto.whatP1: We collect promises only from official sources. We never contact politicians. We never accept money from parties or governments. We never editorialize.
manifesto.whatP2: We copy. We organize. We compare.
manifesto.pillar1Desc: We are the mirror, not the judge. Contrast reveals what words try to hide.
manifesto.pillar2Desc: We operate within each country's legal framework, without exception.
manifesto.pillar3Desc: If there is a proposal that affects people's lives, there must be clarity.
manifesto.pillar4Desc: Comparing is an act of intelligence. It is our universal language.
manifesto.pillar5Desc: Every record is timestamped, URL-cited, and cryptographically archived.
manifesto.pillar6Desc: We never reach out to candidates or parties. We only observe public records.
manifesto.pillar7Desc: Our code, data, and methodology are fully open-source and auditable.
manifesto.pillar8Desc: No ads. No sponsored content. No monetization. Ever.
manifesto.ctaSubtitle: Because the world is clearer when you see the difference.

footer.tagline: Comparing political campaigns — because the world is clearer when you see the difference.
footer.neutral: Zero bias · Zero contact · Zero agenda
footer.copyright: World Contrast — Non-profit · Open-source · All data public domain

meta.homeDescription: See what candidates promised, side by side. Official sources only. Zero bias. Free forever.
